codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original feature commit plus the follow-up hardening commit. The prior blocking gaps are addressed: scheduler completion now persists processor-supplied provider latency/token metrics, and unrecoverable parser failures are converted into structured `parser_error` outcomes that enqueue a single summary-note fallback instead of failing the run.

summary: Re-reviewed `pipeline-provider-and-parser` against the prior failed scrutiny report and the fix commit `5e15737ae042d3ecb82075a6994fcc0cf12bd4a1`. Current llm/scheduler integration now carries successful provider metrics through `scheduler.ProcessOutcome` into persisted `review_runs`, and parser failures now land on a structured `parser_error` path with a pending `summary_note` fallback action and no inline findings. Diff, transcript skeleton, handoffs, skill guidance, and shared-state files were checked; no remaining feature-scoped issues were found.
